title: MazeAuth
description: Player Authentication System for Minecraft offline servers.
body:
## Secure, Lightweight Authentication for Your Server

MazeAuth is a powerful yet simple authentication plugin designed for modern Minecraft servers. Protect your server with a robust registration and login system that balances security and user experience.

## Features

- **Secure Authentication** - BCrypt password hashing with session management and device fingerprinting
-  **Hybrid Server Support** - Auto-detect Premium Java, Cracked, and Bedrock players
-  **Pre-Login Lockdown** - Block movement, chat, and interactions until authenticated
-  **Dual Database** - SQLite (default) or MySQL with HikariCP
-  **Folia-Ready** - Full regional threading support
-  **Modern Formatting** - MiniMessage and legacy color code support

### Protect Your Server
- Prevent unauthorized access
- Customizable password requirements
- Session management
- Configurable login attempt limits
- Permission-based command system
